3191470.name: DON'T MOVE
3191470.description:
DON'T MOVE is an immersive VR game where your ability to HOLD YOUR NERVE and stay PERFECTLY STILL, no matter what comes at you is key to succeeding.

Perfect for Friends and Families - Using the 'GALLERY' mode - and unlocked sequences can be replayed at any time.

Challenge each other to 'hold your nerve' for as long as possible.

A statement from the FLINCH-INC Dummy Testing Facility - 

Here in the test facility we use every testing apparatus available, no matter how ludicrous. To test the strength and resolve of all our dummies. We pride ourselves on creating dummies with near zero 'flinch' mechanics. As our founder famously stated time and time again. 'You won't find a more willing dummy - than a 'Flinch-Inc' dummy

FEATURES

  • IMMERSIVE VR EXPERIENCE - Experience the horrors of the test facility as the testing team throws test after horrifying test at you.

  • BIANURAL AUDIO - A fully Ambisonic/Binaural sound mix puts you right in the middle of this immersive experience.

  • SEATED or STANDING MODE - Seated mode is recommended but if you want a real challenge - try the experience in standing mode.

  • PCVR - PCVR compatible for the best most immersive experience.

  • Future 'Flinch-Pack' expansions planned. Opening up our discord for suggestions on expanding the testing facilities testing schedule. 

STORY

Flinch Inc.: The Unshakable Standard in Crash Testing

Founded in 1908 at the dawn of the automobile age, Flinch Inc. took its mission seriously—perhaps too seriously. With Henry Ford’s Model T hitting the streets, the world needed safety measures, and Flinch Inc. proudly stepped up, declaring themselves the sole purveyors of the finest, most unflinching crash test dummies in existence.

From day one, their guiding principle was simple: a dummy that flinches is a dummy that fails.

Flinch Inc. had simply mastered the art of absolute rigidity. Their dummies did not flinch, blink, nor, on one particularly unfortunate occasion, even bend when required. The company briefly pivoted to manufacturing statues before recommitting to crash test excellence.

To this day, Flinch Inc. stands proudly behind its century-long legacy, ensuring that no safety test is compromised by so much as a hint of reflexive fear.
